title: Enhancing Antimicrobial Susceptibility Testing for Acinetobacter baumannii
author: Sakyi Opoku, Mishra, et al.
materials: Cryogenic stocks of Acinetobacter baumannii isolate(s) of interest
McFarland Standard Kit (ThermoFisher, cat. no. R20241)
Roswell Park Memorial Institute medium (RPMI 1640; Gibco, cat. no. 11875119)
Mueller Hinton II Broth (MHB; BD, cat. no. 212322)

steps.title: Day 2: Perform MIC testing using the BMD method in both RPMI and MHB media
steps.instruction: Refer to CLSI guidelines (Lewis et al., 2025) for MIC breakpoints, quality control strains, etc.
